title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Yes Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Yes Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Yes Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Yes Bank:
Yes Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
